meta.title: Taara Jyotishyam — Free Vedic Birth Chart & Jyotish Reading
meta.description: Generate your accurate Vedic birth chart in seconds. Free Jyotish readings for personality, career, and your current life phase — in English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, Telugu, and Tamil. No signup. No upselling.

hero.title: Your Vedic Birth Chart
hero.subtitle: Accurate Lahiri sidereal chart with personalised Jyotish readings — in English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, Telugu, and Tamil.

form.title: Birth Details
form.hint: Pick your date and time from the dropdowns — no calendar needed.
form.name: Name (optional)
form.noPlacesFound: No places found — try another spelling

chart.title: Rashi Chart (D1)
chart.printHint: Opens your browser print dialog — choose Save as PDF to keep a copy.

reading.title: Jyotish Reading
reading.subtitle: Grounded in your calculated chart — nine planetary positions read with classical Jyotish principles. Specific to you, not your sun sign.
reading.waitHint: Preparing your reading — first words appear in 5–15 seconds. Please wait.
reading.limitReached: Daily reading limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
reading.noApiKey: Readings are not available right now. Please try again later.
reading.statusError: Could not reach the reading service. Please try again later.
reading.emptyReading: No reading was returned. Please try again.
reading.disclaimer: For guidance and entertainment only. Not medical, legal, or financial advice.
reading.truncated: Reading may be incomplete. Try the detailed reading option for more.

teaser.label: Free preview
teaser.title: A glimpse of your chart
teaser.upsellBody: Each section below is a full 3-paragraph Jyotish reading drawn entirely from your chart — specific to your planets, not a generic profile. Pick one section or get all five at a discount.

payments.intro: Unlock a full personalised reading for this chart. Pay once per section — yours to keep, no subscription.
payments.singleHint: One section of your choice — Personality, Career, or your current Dasha period.
payments.bundleHint: All five sections — Personality, Career, Dasha, Financial & Marriage — with longer, more detailed output.
payments.required: Please complete payment to generate this reading.
payments.alreadyUsed: You have already used this paid reading for this section.
payments.unlockHint: Pay above to unlock this section, then tap Get Reading.
payments.usedHint: This paid section has already been generated for this chart.
payments.orderFailed: Could not start payment. Please try again.
payments.verifyFailed: Payment could not be verified. Contact support if money was deducted.
payments.disclaimer: Paid readings are for guidance and entertainment only. Payments are processed securely by Razorpay.

qa.title: Ask about your chart
qa.subtitle: Ask anything about your chart — grounded in your actual planetary positions, not generic zodiac advice.
qa.unavailable: Chart Q&A is not available right now.
qa.limitReached: Daily question limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
qa.empty: Ask anything about your personality, career, relationships, or current life phase.
qa.placeholder: e.g. Why might I feel restless in my career right now?
qa.genericError: Could not get an answer. Please try again.
qa.emptyReply: No answer was returned. Please try again.
qa.disclaimer: Answers are for guidance and entertainment only. Not medical, legal, or financial advice.

suggestions.dasha: What does my current life phase mean?
suggestions.timing: What should I focus on this year?
suggestions.children: What does my chart say about children?

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidBirth: Please check your birth date, time, and place.

footer.license: Sidereal calculations use Lahiri ayanamsa. No remedies, no gemstone recommendations.
